nasb.text: The man answered and said to them, “Well, here is an amazing thing, that you do not know where He is from, and yet He opened my eyes.

esv.text: The man answered, “Why, this is an amazing thing! You do not know where he comes from, and yet he opened my eyes.

cnv.text: 那人對他們說：“這就奇怪了，他開了我的眼睛，你們竟然不知道他從哪裡來。

ccb.text: 那人说：“祂开了我的眼睛，你们竟不知道祂从哪里来，真是奇怪。

csbs.text: 他回答说：“这就奇怪了！他开了我的眼睛，你们竟然不知道他是从哪里来的！
